\tzpentry{ID4795}{Text Information Measure}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4795 introduces Text Information Measure as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathcal{I}_{\\text{density}} = \\log_2(153,600) \\approx 17.23 \\text{ bits/state transition}\n\\end{equation}
